q.zh: 伊丽莎白一世的父亲是谁？

explain.en: The book states: 'Elizabeth's father—Henry VIII—was the king of England.' She was born to Henry VIII and Anne Boleyn.
explain.zh: 书中写道：「伊丽莎白的父亲——亨利八世——是英格兰国王。」她由亨利八世与安妮·博林所生。

q.en: Why did Henry VIII create the Church of England?
q.zh: 亨利八世为什么要创立英国国教（Church of England）？

options.en: the pope refused to annul his marriage to Catherine of Aragon
options.zh: 教皇拒绝废除他与阿拉贡的凯瑟琳的婚姻

explain.en: The book says Henry 'asked the pope... to annul his marriage to Catherine. The pope refused... Henry formed a separate church and established himself as its supreme ruler. He called the new church the Church of England.'
explain.zh: 书中说亨利「请求教皇……废除他与凯瑟琳的婚姻。教皇拒绝……亨利另立教会，自任最高统治者。他称新教会为英国国教。」

q.en: What nickname did Mary I earn for executing about three hundred people convicted of opposing the Catholic Church?
q.zh: 玛丽一世因处决约三百名被定罪反对天主教会的人而获得了什么绰号？

explain.en: The book states Mary 'ordered executions of about three hundred people convicted of being against the Catholic Church. This earned her the nickname Bloody Mary.'
explain.zh: 书中写道，玛丽「下令处决约三百名被定罪反对天主教会的人。这为她赢得了「血腥玛丽」的绰号。」

q.en: In what year did the Spanish Armada sail to try to invade England?
q.zh: 西班牙无敌舰队（Spanish Armada）是在哪一年出征试图入侵英格兰的？

explain.en: The book says: 'In 1588, Philip ordered the Spanish Armada to set sail with the intention of invading England.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：「1588年，腓力命令西班牙无敌舰队启航，意图入侵英格兰。」

q.en: In the glossary, what does the word 'annul' mean?
q.zh: 在词汇表中，「annul」（废除）一词是什么意思？

explain.en: The glossary defines 'annul (v.)' as 'to officially end something; to declare something legally invalid.' Henry asked the pope to annul his first marriage.
explain.zh: 词汇表将「annul（动词）」定义为「正式结束某事；宣布某事在法律上无效」。亨利曾请求教皇废除他的第一次婚姻。

q.en: What does the word 'treason' mean in the book's glossary?
q.zh: 书中词汇表的「treason」（叛国）一词是什么意思？

options.en: a crime of betrayal or disloyalty against one's government or ruler
options.zh: 背叛或不忠于自己政府或统治者的罪行

explain.en: The glossary defines 'treason (n.)' as 'a crime of betrayal or disloyalty against one's government or ruler.' Anne Boleyn and Mary, Queen of Scots were both executed for treason.
explain.zh: 词汇表将「treason（名词）」定义为「背叛或不忠于自己政府或统治者的罪行」。安妮·博林和苏格兰女王玛丽都因叛国被处决。

q.en: According to the book, how long did Elizabeth I reign as queen?
q.zh: 根据本书，伊丽莎白一世在位统治了多长时间？

explain.en: The book states: 'When Elizabeth died in 1603, she had reigned for forty-four years.' She was crowned in 1559 at age twenty-five.
explain.zh: 书中写道：「伊丽莎白于1603年去世，已在位44年。」她于1559年25岁时加冕。

q.en: What happened to Mary, Queen of Scots, and why?
q.zh: 苏格兰女王玛丽遭遇了什么，原因是什么？

options.en: she was imprisoned 19 years and executed in 1587 for plotting against Elizabeth
options.zh: 她被囚禁19年，并于1587年因密谋反对伊丽莎白而被处决

explain.en: The book says Elizabeth had Mary 'imprisoned for nineteen years' and in 1587, after Mary was found guilty of plotting to assassinate Elizabeth, 'She was executed on February 8, 1587.'
explain.zh: 书中说伊丽莎白将玛丽「囚禁了19年」，1587年玛丽被判定密谋暗杀伊丽莎白后，「于1587年2月8日被处决」。

q.en: Why does the author begin by calling Elizabeth 'perhaps the greatest English monarch of all time'?
q.zh: 作者为何开篇称伊丽莎白「或许是有史以来最伟大的英格兰君主」？

options.en: To present her as one of the greatest British monarchs and explain why
options.zh: 为了将她呈现为最伟大的英国君主之一并解释原因
仅仅为了描述她的童年

explain.en: The Focus Question asks 'Why is Queen Elizabeth I considered one of the greatest British monarchs?' The book frames her reign—defeating the Armada, the Golden Age—as proof of her greatness.
explain.zh: 聚焦问题问「为什么伊丽莎白一世被视为最伟大的英国君主之一？」书中以她的统治——击败无敌舰队、黄金时代——作为伟大的证明。

q.en: What does the author say Elizabeth's reign became known as?
q.zh: 作者说伊丽莎白的统治被称为什么？

options.en: the Elizabethan Age, known as the Golden Age of English history
options.zh: 伊丽莎白时代，被称为英格兰历史上的黄金时代

explain.en: The book states: 'England was set to become a global empire and the Elizabethan Age came to be known as the Golden Age in English history.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：「英格兰将成为全球帝国，伊丽莎白时代被称为英格兰历史上的黄金时代。」

prompt.en: Elizabeth I never married and was called the 'Virgin Queen.' Do you think her choice to remain unmarried helped or hurt her as a ruler? Use an idea from the book to support your answer.
prompt.zh: 伊丽莎白一世终身未嫁，被称为「童贞女王」。你认为她选择不结婚对她作为统治者是有利还是不利？用书中一个观点来支持你的回答。

en: Refer to her fear that marrying a foreign king would put England under another country's rule.
Consider that she rejected all proposals to keep her power as queen.
zh: 提及她担心嫁给外国国王会使英格兰受制于他国。
考虑她拒绝所有求婚以保住女王权力。
